tools.name: create_survey
tools.description: Generate a professional survey using AI based on a research goal. Returns the survey ID and shareable link.

tools.name: get_surveys
tools.description: List all surveys belonging to the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_responses
tools.description: Get all responses submitted to a specific survey.

tools.name: get_ai_report
tools.description: Generate an AI analysis report for a survey's responses. Returns executive summary, key metrics, per-question insights, and action recommendations.

tools.name: publish_survey
tools.description: Publish a survey to make it accessible via its share link.

tools.name: get_survey_link
tools.description: Get the shareable link for a published survey.
